openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-luna.answer:
There was **no confirmed “final offer”** from Eli Lilly to acquire Abivax in 2026.

The **€15 billion (approximately $17.5 billion)** figure was a **reported/rumored potential deal value**, attributed to the French outlet *La Lettre*—not a formally submitted or accepted offer. Eli Lilly declined to comment, and France’s finance ministry said it had received **no formal foreign-investment request**
